description_long: This is a modern, multi-layered mattress with a rectangular shape and rounded corners. The top surface features a white quilted cover with a subtle circular pattern, providing a soft and inviting appearance. A cutaway section reveals several internal foam layers in varying colors, including blue, purple, and beige, indicating different densities and support zones. The sides of the mattress are wrapped in a black and white fabric with horizontal striping and reinforced with white vertical bands, likely for added structure and durability. The overall construction suggests a hybrid or memory foam design, optimized for comfort and support. The mattress appears clean, well-constructed, and suitable for use in bedrooms or as discarded furniture in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, multi-layered mattress with a white quilted top, visible foam layers in blue and purple, and black-and-white striped sides with reinforced bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the quilted white top, cutaway revealing internal foam layers, and black-and-white striped side with vertical bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended blue foam layer, the layered internal structure, and the continuous black-and-white side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the quilted top and the layered cross-section, with less of the internal foam visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue foam layer extending out, the black-and-white side panel, and vertical reinforcement bands.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted circular pattern evenly distributed across the white top surface.
attribute_edge_piping: White piping runs continuously around the edges, moderately thick and made of fabric, providing a defined border.
